summary: AI Delivery and Digital Transformation Executive with 20+ years leading global technology delivery organizations across HealthTech, FinTech, and e-commerce in GCC and Egypt. Currently leading the largest live AI deployment in GCC healthcare — 14 production AI agents in active clinical operations at Saudi German Health — managing a $50M transformation programme across 15 hospitals in KSA, UAE, and Egypt. Proven track record building delivery frameworks from the ground up, leading cross-functional squads across AI solution architecture, application delivery, and data engineering. Built enterprise PMO managing 300+ concurrent projects across 8 countries at Network International. Expert in translating AI strategy into scalable, enterprise-grade delivery models — combining executive governance with hands-on delivery accountability. MBA candidate at Paris ESLSCA Business School. Cloud platform expertise across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Certified PMP, CBAP, CSM, CSPO, Lean Six Sigma.

items: AI and LLM Deployment (14 production agents)
MLOps and AI Model Lifecycle Management
Strategic Partnership with Hyperscalers and Vendors

experience.title: PMO and Regional Engagement Lead
bullets: Leads the largest live AI delivery programme in GCC healthcare — 14 production AI agents deployed in active clinical operations across 15-hospital network in KSA, UAE, and Egypt, managing $50M transformation programme

Established AI delivery governance framework covering solution architecture, application delivery, data engineering, and QA squads — ensuring all deployments follow a structured Process to Pilot to Rollout to Success lifecycle

Provides executive oversight for design, build, and implementation of AI-powered clinical platforms including AI-powered clinical decision support, predictive analytics, and enterprise data warehouse solutions

Partners with AI solution architects and technology leaders (Health Catalyst, KLAS Research) to define end-to-end architectures that are secure, scalable, and compliant with JCI, HIMSS, and MOH standards
Monitors delivery velocity, run-rate, and quality assurance across multiple concurrent global projects, implementing continuous improvement mechanisms and proactive governance
Leads cross-functional squads of 30 professionals — building a high-performance delivery organization centred on accountability, transparency, and Responsible AI principles
Engages directly with C-suite clients and business sponsors to represent delivery strategy, progress, and measurable business outcomes

experience.title: Country Manager
bullets: Led AI-enabled FinTech platform delivery for Egypt's first comprehensive SuperApp, overseeing architecture, engineering, and application delivery teams in a fast-moving startup environment
Established delivery frameworks and governance models translating product strategy into scalable, phased rollout plans
Partnered with engineering teams and technology vendors to drive cloud-native platform delivery, ensuring reliability and on-time execution
Engaged directly with enterprise clients and regulators to align delivery strategy with business requirements and compliance standards

experience.title: Head of E-Commerce Product and IT Strategy
bullets: Led technology delivery organization for digital transformation of one of Egypt's largest consumer electronics retailers
Defined delivery roadmaps, KPI frameworks, and governance standards across product, IT, and engineering teams
Implemented continuous improvement mechanisms and delivery analytics to drive operational performance and on-time execution

experience.title: Product Development Manager
bullets: Led global product delivery organization during hypergrowth — contributing to platform scaling from 30,000 to 7 million daily orders across GCC markets (233x growth)
Established delivery standards, sprint cadences, and quality assurance frameworks coordinating squads across Berlin HQ, GCC, and Egypt
Drove continuous improvement and delivery automation, reducing time-to-market for platform features while maintaining service quality at scale

experience.title: PMO Section Head
bullets: Built global delivery organization from the ground up — managing 300+ concurrent banking and technology projects across 8 countries (Egypt, UAE, Jordan, Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Mauritius, South Africa)
Led cross-functional delivery squads of 16 Project Managers, building a high-performance organization centred on accountability and delivery excellence
Established enterprise delivery frameworks, KPI monitoring, risk management, and governance standards adopted across the global portfolio
Governed 14-month Salesforce enterprise implementation (170 users, 8 countries) — end-to-end from architecture through rollout and go-live
Partnered with Finance and PMO for delivery budgets, capacity planning, and resource optimization across 300+ banking clients worldwide

experience.title: Engagement Manager
bullets: Led delivery of strategic transformation programmes for Mayo Clinic (healthcare business process optimisation) and AT&T (service operations transformation)
Defined delivery strategies, governance frameworks, and performance KPIs for large-scale enterprise transformation engagements
Engaged directly with C-suite executives and business sponsors to align delivery execution with strategic outcomes

experience.title: Earlier Experience (2004-2013)

bullets: Senior Project Manager, PMO at BlueCloud (2012-2013): Technology delivery for Microsoft Egypt, Vodafone Egypt, Qatar Diar
